data.name: label1.Text
data.value: *** For GTS series models, due to different aspect ratios and different rounding of corners, full scaling is not possible, part of the image below and at the corners may be cut off.

data.name: label_ConvertingHelp03.Text
data.value: !!! Check the resulting dial after conversion !!!

data.name: label_ConvertingHelp02.Text
data.value: ** Conversion will resize images, circle radius, line width, recalculating element´s coordinates.

data.name: label_ConvertingHelp01.Text
data.value: * A new directory will be created next to the existing directory for the resulting dial.

data.name: label_ConvertingHelp.Text
data.value: Open the desired watch face or save the current one.

data.name: label9.Text
data.value: You need to select the emulator model that matches the watch face. The emulator is not a real watch, not all of its features work correctly.

data.name: label18.Text
data.value: The number of frames to save

data.name: button_CaptureSaveGif.Text
data.value: Save the animation as a GIF

data.name: label6.Text
data.value: This feature is intended for experienced users. To use it, you must have the following utilities installed and configured:

data.name: label5.Text
data.value: NOTE: A third-party website is used to generate the QR code. If you experience any issues accessing or using the website, this function will not work. The QR code is temporary and will only be valid for the selected period of time.

data.name: label7.Text
data.value: NOTE: You need to register on the website and get an API key. There is no time limit on how long files can be stored on the website. You can manage your uploaded files in your account on the website.

data.name: checkBox_DevelopmentMode.Text
data.value: Create watch faces in developer mode (for expert users, allows logs to be displayed in watch faces)

data.name: checkBox_Del_Confirm.Text
data.value: Request confirmation when deleting a widget

data.name: groupBox4.Text
data.value: Convert images without loss of quality

data.name: radioButton_ARGB_forced.Text
data.value: Force to use the ARGB format

data.name: radioButton_ARGB_color.Text
data.value: Only with the specified number of colors

data.name: checkBox_Buttons_In_Gif.Text
data.value: Highlight buttons when saving gif file

data.name: checkBox_AllWidgetsInGif.Text
data.value: Show all elements of edited zones when saving a gif file

data.name: checkBox_WatchSkin_Use.Text
data.value: Use watch image when saving *.png and *.gif

data.name: checkBox_ShowIn12hourFormat.Text
data.value: If possible, display time in 12-hour format

data.name: checkBox_Shortcuts_In_Gif.Text
data.value: Highlight shortcuts when saving gif file

data.name: checkBox_JsonWarnings.Text
data.value: Show warning when saving JSON file

data.name: groupBox7.Text
data.value: Action after packing the watch face

data.name: radioButton_Settings_Open_Download.Text
data.value: Load Preview.States from project folder (if exists)

data.name: groupBox5.Text
data.value: Action after unpacking the watch face

data.name: groupBox1.Text
data.value: Action if the names of the unpacked watch faces match

data.name: label483.Text
data.value: Animation speed of animation preview (high speed - smoother animation, more system load)

data.name: label4.Text
data.value: * I am not the author of these lessons and am not responsible for the accuracy of the information contained therein. The information in the lessons may be outdated or inaccurate.

data.name: label2.Text
data.value: The programme uses code to convert images from the utility:

data.name: label_donate.Text
data.value: Donate to the author PayPal: sashacx75@gmail.com

data.name: label413.Text
data.value: Utility to convert images from watch faces to normal PNG format:

data.name: label409.Text
data.value: The program is an editor for dials GTR 3, GTS 3. Since dials are almost full-fledged programs, it is impossible to implement all the functionality available for dials in this editor. The editor should be able to recognize most of the watch faces created in him or on dev.huami.com. But it cannot recognize watch faces from Zepp app.

data.name: checkBox_CircleScaleImage.Text
data.value: Highlight the entire space occupied by circle and line progress

data.name: checkBox_crop.Text
data.value: Crop image to fit the screen (may work slowly)
